results.title: Kelli Law
highlights:
Vice President, AI Product and Value at [Diamondback Energy](https://www.linkedin.com/company/diamondback-energy-services)
...
### Vice President, AI Product and Value at [Diamondback Energy](https://www.linkedin.com/company/diamondback-energy-services) (Current)
...
Lead enterprise AI strategy and product portfolio to drive measurable business value across operations and corporate functions. Responsible for establishing AI as a core enterprise capability, grounded in product discipline, governance, and accountable value realization. Key focus areas include:
...
- Building and managing an AI product portfolio aligned to strategic priorities
- Connecting advanced analytics and machine learning directly to operational and financial outcomes
- Implementing responsible AI governance, transparency, and risk management frameworks
- Partnering across engineering, data, and domain leadership to deliver scalable solutions
- Establishing repeatable value measurement and impact tracking mechanisms AI at Diamondback is focused on enhancing operational excellence, capital efficiency, safety, and decision velocity. The objective is durable competitive advantage through intelligent systems embedded in core workflows.
...
Led R&D initiatives, strategy development, and proposals centered on big data storage, data management, Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), and advanced analytics across diverse data types and mission domains. Delivered solutions that enabled secure, timely, and mission-critical data access—“the right data to the right user at the right time.” Supported Intelligence Community customers and leading research organizations including AFRL, DARPA, IARPA, and NRL.
...
Worked captures, proposals, R&D, and program execution spanning Artificial Intelligence (AI), Machine Learning (ML), and Advanced Analytics applied to diverse
...
00M. Applied expertise across programming languages (Java, C++, C#, C, Python, SQL, GraphQL), databases (NoSQL, relational, graph), and machine learning techniques including supervised/unsupervised learning, NLP, support vector machines, and recommendation systems. Focused primarily on anomaly detection and pattern recognition. Experience with User Experience and Feedback Loops
...
I am excited to share that I have joined Diamondback Energy as Vice President, AI Product and Value.
...
AI is entering a new phase. The era of experimentation is giving way to the era of accountability and measurable results. The question is no longer whether AI works. The question is whether it delivers durable business value at scale.
...
At Diamondback, my mandate is clear. Build AI as a core enterprise capability grounded in outcomes, discipline, and strategic alignment.
...
That means:
...
• Managing AI as a product portfolio with clear ownership and prioritization
 • Connecting models directly to operational and financial performance
 • Embedding governance, transparency, and risk management from day one
 • Creating repeatable frameworks for value realization across the business
...
AI should inform capital allocation. It should strengthen safety and operational excellence. It should accelerate decision velocity. And it should create sustained competitive advantage.
...
I am grateful to join Greg Dolezal ’s organization and partner closely with Matt Oefinger, as we build an integrated, outcome driven AI capability across the enterprise.
...
What makes this especially exciting is the leadership team at Diamondback. They are deeply technology savvy and intentionally leaning into AI as a strategic lever for the business. That level of alignment creates real momentum.
...
The work begins now. ⚡ 

If you are passionate about responsible AI, enterprise transformation, or building intelligent systems that drive measurable impact, I would welcome the conversation. #ArtificialIntelligence #AILeadership #EnterpriseAI #AIProduct #ValueCreation #EnergyInnovation #DigitalTransformation

✅ Earned my Snowflake Platform Certification! ❄️ 
✅ Completed 25+ hours of hands-on Snowflake training and labs focused on utilizing Cortex AI, training ML models (building a fraud detection model with XGBoost in Snowflake Notebooks was a personal favorite), and building real-time data pipelines using Openflow (Apache NiFi).

...
My Main Takeaways: Summit really highlighted how powerful Snowflake’s agentic coding platform, CoCo, has become over the last 6 months at seamlessly utilizing the entire Snowflake ecosystem. Seeing various agentic AI use cases in action immediately sparked ideas for my own day-to-day workflow. I can see clear applications for spinning up data pipelines faster, deploying models more efficiently, and building semantic layers so business users can extract precise insights using natural language.
...
A big thank you to my employer, Diamondback Energy , for the opportunity to attend this awesome event and invest in my professional growth. Also, a huge shoutout to my coworkers Mohamed Ali , Ethan Garrett, CPA , and Macky Brock McWhirter for making the trip an absolute blast. 🚀 #SnowflakeSummit #DataEngineering #MachineLearning #AI #CloudArchitecture #SoftwareEngineering #Snowflake

results.title: Staff Counsel - Mineral Land at DIAMONDBACK ENERGY | Vaquill Legal Jobs
highlights:
Staff Counsel - Mineral Land at DIAMONDBACK ENERGY | Vaquill Legal Jobs
...
# Staff Counsel - Mineral Land
...
DIAMONDBACK ENERGY
...
Midland, TX, US
...
## About this role
...
The Staff Counsel position will provide legal services to the Company’s Land, Operations and other business units related to mineral development, including assisting in asset acquisitions, divestitures, and exchanges. This position provides day-to-day advice on a broad range of oil and gas legal issues, including operational and transactional matters, but will also be expected to competently provide a variety of other general legal advice and services to business units throughout the Company. Title will be commensurate with experience and qualifications.
...
Job Responsibilities
...
- Provide legal support to land, operations, and commercial teams on matters related to oil and gas exploration, development, and production, including leases, mineral ownership, and property rights.
...
- Advise on a wide range of operational and transactional issues, including royalty matters, joint operating agreements, pipelines, geophysical activities, and marketing arrangements.
...
- Draft, review, and negotiate a variety of commercial agreements, ensuring alignment with business objectives and company risk tolerance.
...
- Support acquisitions, divestitures, and asset trades, including conducting legal due diligence and assisting with the preparation and review of transaction documents.
...
- Partner with internal stakeholders to identify legal risks and provide practical, business-oriented recommendations to support operational and strategic goals.
...
- Collaborate with and manage outside counsel as needed on specialized matters, disputes, and regulatory issues.
...
Required Qualifications:
...
- J.D. from an accredited law school with strong academic credentials
- Admission to a state bar with ability to practice in-house in the State of Texas
- Five (5+) years experience as a practicing attorney; prior in-house experience preferred
- Upstream oil and gas legal experience in a law firm, governmental agency, or in-house
...
- Demonstrated experience in: handling complex royalty matters, drafting, negotiation, and closing oil and gas acquisition, divestiture, and exchange transactions; providing general legal advice and counsel to oil and gas exploration clients; preparing oil and gas title opinions; handling midstream and marketing matters
...
- Ability to provide legal advice on a vast array of contractual matters relating to oil and gas exploration infrastructure development and operations
...
- Excellent communication (written and verbal) and analytic skills with a strong ability to draft and review complex legal documents and apply legal advice in a timely and practical manner
...
Diamondback Energy is not currently sponsoring employment visas for this position.

We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities

highlights:
Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning | Wfh
...
# Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning
...
### About the role:
...
Angi is seeking an exceptional Director, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning to be a driving force behind Angi's transformation. The role is to be a leader in our Artificial Intelligence team, tackling challenges such as integrating Angi's search with LLM Providers like OpenAI GPT and Google Gemini. This is a leadership role, leading a team of dedicated machine learning engineers to both develop ML prototypes and then take them to production. In addition to being a leader, we're also looking for someone who can dive into tech and get their hands dirty to solve some of Angi's biggest technical challenges.
...
- Leadership: Lead and grow a team of talented machine learning engineers, providing guidance, mentorship, and support to foster professional growth. For our most complex challenges, you will dive into the tech to work through solutioning alongside your team.
...
- LLM Deployment and Optimization: Oversee the fine-tuning and deployment of LLMs, including Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in an agentic framework, with a focus on optimizing model performance and scalability to enhance user experience and drive business results.
...
- Integration with 3rd Party AI APIs: Oversee the integration and management of AI tools and third-party solutions, including OpenAI GPT, Google Gemini, Meta AI, and Salesforce AI, to enhance user experience and business performance.
...
- Engineering & Product Collaboration: Partner with engineering, product, and design teams to build robust, scalable real-time APIs, and work on the entire development process to seamlessly integrate AI solutions into our products.
...
- Innovation: Foster innovation within the team, exploring new approaches and techniques to solve complex business problems.
...
- Who you are
...
- You have a Master's or Ph.D. in a computer science or quantitative field (e.g., Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or related fields).
- You have 10+ years of experience in machine learning & engineering, with a focus on large-scale distributed application architecture for deploying ML models to production.
- You are an expert in machine learning deployment, API development, and real-time ML workloads.
- You are proficient in Python and comfortable diving deep into technical challenges alongside your team.
- You have excellent communication skills with the ability to convey complex technical concepts to non-technical stakeholders.
...
